name: Tournedos De Filet Mignon Cordon Bleu
recipeInstructions:
Tournedos de Filet Mignon Cordon Bleu No. 666 Yields 4 Servings
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Cut a slice in the upper surface of each fillet, near the edge, to form a pocket.
3. Stuff one slice of Swiss cheese and half of the Prosciutto into each pocket.
4. Secure the pocket closed using a toothpick.
5. Wrap one slice of bacon around the edge of each fillet.
6. Saute on both sides in clarified butter until lightly browned.
7. Place on a baking sheet and put under the broiler about 4 inches from the heat.
8. Broil for about 4 minutes per side, or until well browned on the outside but rare in the center and the cheese is completely melted.
9. The Béarnaise Sauce should either still be warm from preparation or gently warmed before using.
10. Place fillets on hot dishes and pour a generous amount of Béarnaise sauce over each.
